summary: Comprehensive testing of new features: Auto-sync scheduling, Sync History dashboard, Shopify Embedded Dashboard polish, and Extended Dynamic SSR. All 14 backend tests pass. All frontend tests pass. Auto-sync task 'auto_sync_connected_stores' is registered and scheduled to run every 6 hours. Sync history endpoints work correctly. Shopify Embedded Dashboard has tabbed interface with trending/radar/exports tabs. SSR works for /trending-products, /discover, and /reports/weekly-winning-products.

issues: Route is at /embedded not /shopify/embedded/app as mentioned in problem statement - documentation mismatch

action_items: Update documentation: Shopify Embedded Dashboard route is /embedded?shop=xxx&host=xxx, not /shopify/embedded/app
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working correctly. Auto-sync task runs every 6 hours (0 */6 * * *). Sync history endpoints at /api/sync/history and /api/sync/history/summary require auth. SyncHistory component only renders if there's sync history data. Shopify Embedded Dashboard at /embedded (not /shopify/embedded/app) has 3 tabs: Trending, Radar, Exports. SSR works for crawlers on /trending-products, /discover, /reports/weekly-winning-products.

backend_api_tests.GET /api/jobs/status (scheduler check): PASS - auto_sync_connected_stores task registered with schedule '0 */6 * * *'

frontend_ui_tests.Synced Products empty state: PASS - Shows 'No Synced Products' with 'Connect a Store' button
frontend_ui_tests.SyncHistory component: INFO - Not visible (no sync history data for test user)
frontend_ui_tests.Embedded Dashboard tabs: PASS - Trending, Radar, Exports tabs all present
frontend_ui_tests.Embedded Dashboard stats: PASS - Shows 8 Trending, 0 Exported, 0 Radar Alerts
frontend_ui_tests.Embedded Dashboard tab switching: PASS - All tabs clickable and switch content

ssr_tests.Googlebot /trending-products: PASS - Has ssr-content div with 20 article tags
ssr_tests.Googlebot /discover: PASS - Has ssr-content div with product data

features_verified: GET /api/sync/history returns sync history for authenticated user
Auto-sync task 'auto_sync_connected_stores' is registered in scheduler with '0 */6 * * *' schedule
Login works for admin and demo users
Synced Products page at /synced-products loads with SyncHistory component (renders only with data)
Shopify Embedded Dashboard has tabbed interface (trending/radar/exports tabs)
Shopify Embedded Dashboard shows when shop param is present at /embedded
SSR: Googlebot request to /trending-products returns articles
SSR: Googlebot request to /discover returns articles with product data
SSR: Googlebot request to /reports/weekly-winning-products returns articles
SSR: Regular browser request to /discover does NOT contain ssr-content

auto_sync_connected_stores.description: Auto-sync products from all connected stores every 6 hours
